criteria.name: Mermaid Syntax Validity
criteria.description: Diagram must parse successfully with Mermaid CLI v10.2.0+ without warnings or errors. Must render identically in both light and dark themes of Mermaid live editor (https://mermaid.live).

criteria.name: C4 Level 1 Completeness
criteria.description: Diagram must contain exactly: (1) One System element representing llm-switch, (2) Two Person elements for Developer and Operations, (3) One Container element per external dependency listed in PRD section 'Integrations'. No additional or missing elements allowed.

criteria.name: PRD Bidirectional Traceability
criteria.description: Every component in diagram must cite a PRD section (format: [PRD X.Y.Z]). Every requirement in PRD section 'Integrations' must be represented by a component in the diagram. Zero tolerance for omissions or hallucinations.

criteria.name: Narrative Structure and Depth
criteria.description: Narrative must include: (1) A table mapping each diagram element to its purpose and PRD section, (2) At least 200 words total, (3) A dedicated paragraph explaining why each external dependency is necessary (not just what it does).

criteria.name: Relationship Specification
criteria.description: For each relationship between llm-switch and external dependencies, narrative must specify: (1) Direction (arrow in diagram must match), (2) Protocol (HTTP, gRPC, etc.), (3) Authentication method (API key, mTLS, etc.) if specified in PRD.

criteria.name: Edge Case: Hallucination Prevention
criteria.description: Diagram must not contain any external dependencies not explicitly listed in PRD section 'Integrations'. Any extra container element results in automatic failure of this criterion.

criteria.name: Edge Case: Boundary Integrity
criteria.description: System boundary must enclose only the llm-switch container. No external dependencies may be drawn inside the system boundary, and llm-switch must not be drawn outside its boundary.

criteria.name: C4 Naming and Styling Compliance
criteria.description: Elements must follow C4 naming: Persons use Sentence case (e.g., 'Developer'), Containers use PascalCase (e.g., 'NomadCluster'), Relationships use sentence case labels. All labels <= 25 characters. No line crossings between containers at different levels.

criteria.name: Version Control Readiness
criteria.description: File must pass markdownlint with rules MD013 (line length <= 120) and MD033 (no inline HTML). No tabs, only spaces. Frontmatter must include sprint_number and sprint_name.
